productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cfc Pes Black Tracksuits
description: Composition Black tracksuit made of 100% polyester Black track jacket that has mock collar, zippered closure on the front, ribbed hem and cuffs, white stripe panels on the shoulder running till the cuffs, two insert pockets on the sides with zippered closures, blue panel and uellow piping details on the sides, graphic print including sponsoring company and Chelsea team badge on the left chest and brand name on the right chest Black tracks that has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, striped panels on the sides, ribbed cuffs and zippered slits towards the hems, blue panel flowing into darts on the back, print of sponsoring company and Chelsea team badge on the right leg and brand name on the left leg Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Wash below 40 degree c Do not soak Do not tumble dry Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron on print/trims/logo Made of polyester fabric, these adidas tracksuits are ideal for all your training needs. The sleek black track jacket complements the pants and the white stripes gives it an added edge. The sleek black track jacket complements the pants and the white stripes gives it an added edge. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customized Fit. The Chelsea team badge gives you an added edge. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session.
